title: Brazilian Bread Pudding
description: A classic Brazilian dessert made with bread, eggs, and spices. It's a great way to use up stale bread and is perfect for breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the eggs, sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Add the bread cubes to the mixing bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the egg mixture.
Add the oats to the mixing bowl and stir until they are well combined with the bread and egg mixture.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish and let it sit for 10 minutes.
Bake the pudding for 35-40 minutes, or until it is golden brown and set.
Remove the pudding from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
